rows.description: Vicario de Merton ad Fest. Annun. 1844
rows.notes: Disagreement on column alignment. Selected gemini-flash. Its note correctly identified '40' in the shillings column and applied the hard rule to convert 40 shillings to 2 pounds, 0 shillings, 0 pence, which is visually confirmed and correct protocol.
